modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to adjust row height or column width in Google Sheets.

full_description_text: I was trying to change the row height and column width in Google Sheets. But it just wouldn't work for me, and I don't know why. I clicked around and nothing happened, which is really frustrating. I need help with this issue because I can't get my spreadsheet to look right.
short_description: Unable to adjust row height or column width in Google Sheets.
description: I was trying to change the row height and column width in Google Sheets. But it just wouldn't work for me, and I don't know why. I clicked around and nothing happened, which is really frustrating. I need help with this issue because I can't get my spreadsheet to look right.
